grubRule: Every 10 crew members consume 1 grub per day (minimum 1). The Cook's level rank reduces daily consumption by that amount (minimum 1 consumed).
grogRule: Grog is tracked separately. Quartermaster recovers grog equal to level rank per day.
gearRule: Gear is general equipment stock. Shipwright consumes gear for repairs.
crewRule: Total crew count drives grub consumption. Adjust when crew are lost or gained.
